languages.text: "У ваших солдат случилось несколько конфликтов с блюстителями Иокасты Заурбэк. Теперь они посматривают на бойцов 32-го с подозрением. Ваши люди хотят знать, как им вести себя с хранителями порядка?"

"There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"
languages.original_text: "У ваших солдат случилось несколько конфликтов с блюстителями Иокасты Заурбэк. Теперь они посматривают на бойцов 32-го с подозрением. Ваши люди хотят знать, как им вести себя с хранителями порядка?"

traits.locale_text: "There've been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. They're looking at the 32nd with distrust now. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

"There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"
"We have already had several run-ins with Mistress Sauerback's enforcers since our arrival. Whenever our paths cross, they look at us with naked suspicion."

"There've been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. They're looking at the 32nd with distrust now. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

"There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

languages.text: 「到着以来、すでに数回、ミストレス・ザウアーバックの取り締まり係と遭遇しています。道が交わると、彼らは裸の疑念で私たちを見ます」
languages.original_text: "We have already had several run-ins with Mistress Sauerback's enforcers since our arrival. Whenever our paths cross, they look at us with naked suspicion."

languages.text: "Askerlerinizle Jocasta Sauerback'in infazcıları arasında itiş kakış yaşandı. Şimdi 32. Alay'a şüpheyle bakıyorlar. İnsanlarınız şunu bilmek istiyor: İnfazcıların etrafında nasıl davranmalılar?"
languages.original_text: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

traits.locale_text: "Askerlerinizle Jocasta Sauerback'in infazcıları arasında itiş kakış yaşandı. Şimdi 32. Alay'a şüpheyle bakıyorlar. İnsanlarınız şunu bilmek istiyor: İnfazcıların etrafında nasıl davranmalılar?"

languages.text: “您的士兵与约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克的执法者发生过数次冲突。如今他们总用怀疑的眼光打量第32团。您的部下想知道，他们在执法者面前该如何行事？”
languages.original_text: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

traits.locale_text: “您的士兵与约卡斯塔·苏尔贝克的执法者发生过数次冲突。如今他们总用怀疑的眼光打量第32团。您的部下想知道，他们在执法者面前该如何行事？”

languages.text: "Es gab einige Zusammenstöße Eurer Soldaten mit Jocasta Sauerbacks Enforcern. Seitdem sind sie dem 32. gegenüber misstrauisch. Eure Leute wollen wissen, wie sie sich den Enforcern gegenüber verhalten sollen."
languages.original_text: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

traits.locale_text: "Es gab einige Zusammenstöße Eurer Soldaten mit Jocasta Sauerbacks Enforcern. Seitdem sind sie dem 32. gegenüber misstrauisch. Eure Leute wollen wissen, wie sie sich den Enforcern gegenüber verhalten sollen."

languages.text: « Il y a eu quelques altercations entre vos soldats et les prévôts de Jocasta Sauerback. Ils se méfient du 32e régiment. Vos gens s'interrogent : comment devrions-nous nous comporter face aux prévôts ? »
languages.original_text: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

traits.locale_text: « Il y a eu quelques altercations entre vos soldats et les prévôts de Jocasta Sauerback. Ils se méfient du 32e régiment. Vos gens s'interrogent : comment devrions-nous nous comporter face aux prévôts ? »

languages.text: «Ha habido algunos conflictos entre sus soldados y los guardias de Jocasta Sauerback. Ahora miran al 32.º con recelo. Su gente necesita saber cómo actuar frente a ellos».
languages.original_text: "There have been a few run-ins between your soldiers and Jocasta Sauerback's enforcers. Now they're looking at the 32nd with suspicion. Your people want to know: how should they conduct themselves around the enforcers?"

traits.locale_text: «Ha habido algunos conflictos entre sus soldados y los guardias de Jocasta Sauerback. Ahora miran al 32.º con recelo. Su gente necesita saber cómo actuar frente a ellos».
